narrative:
Circleville 4-B (precinct in Pickaway County) has 622 registered voters, with 64.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
